channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Eddie Jones reflects on England's loss to Ireland and its impact on team morale
item.description: Former England head coach Eddie Jones has compared the atmosphere following England's recent Six Nations defeat against Ireland to the difficult end of his own tenure at Twickenham. England, aiming fo...

item.title: Manchester United Shocked by Early Crystal Palace Lead in Premier League Clash
item.description: Manchester United were stunned early in their Premier League match against Crystal Palace as the visitors took the lead within five minutes. Maxence Lacroix's brilliant header from a corner silenced t...

item.title: Mexico Deploys Thousands of Soldiers Following Death of Drug Lord El Mencho
item.description: Following the death of Nemesis Oseguera Cervantes, known as 'El Mencho', Mexican authorities have significantly increased military presence in parts of the country to curb violence. Captured by Mexica...

item.title: British Woman Faces Charges After Reporting Alleged Rape in Hong Kong
item.description: Isabel Rose, a 25-year-old British woman from Hackney, London, reported an alleged rape to Hong Kong police in early 2024 after meeting a man she had previously encountered while traveling in Asia. Th...

item.title: US-Israel Airstrike on Iran Hits School, Killing 51 Girls
item.description: In a disturbing escalation of military operations, an airstrike carried out by the United States and Israel has reportedly killed at least 51 girls at a primary school in the southern Iranian city of ...

item.title: Anthropic's AI Safety Challenges and the Consequences of Self-Regulation
item.description: Anthropic, an AI company founded in 2021 by Dario Amodei, is facing backlash after the Trump administration severed ties with it, citing national security concerns. The company’s refusal to use its te...

item.title: UK Regulator Fines Reddit £14m for Failing to Implement Effective Child Age Verification Measures
item.description: Reddit has been fined more than £14 million by the UK’s Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO) following an investigation into the platform’s handling of children’s personal data. The data protection...

item.title: How Epstein Used Dirt on Powerful Figures to Secure His Protection
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein, the convicted sex offender with connections to powerful individuals across the political spectrum, exploited decades-old scandals for leverage. In a 2016 email to journalist Michael W...

item.title: Rangers and Celtic Battle in Old Firm Showdown with Tierney’s Header Narrowing the Gap
item.description: In a tense Old Firm derby, Celtic's hopes were revived by Kieran Tierney's header in the second half, pulling them back into the match after a dominant Rangers first half. With Hearts leading the Scot...

item.title: Exploring Zero-Point Energy: The Nothing That Could Be Everything
item.description: Quantum mechanics suggests that empty space is never truly empty. Even when you remove all visible matter, gases, and even hypothetical dark matter from a box, it is still filled with energy. This lin...

item.title: Iran's Continued Strikes on Gulf Cities: Explosions in Dubai and Interceptions of Drones
item.description: Dubai has experienced a fresh wave of explosions as Iran continues its strikes in the Gulf region. The blasts were reported across Dubai and Doha on Sunday, with authorities confirming they were the r...

item.title: UK Chancellor to Deliver Spring Statement on Economic Forecasts
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves will deliver the UK’s 2026 Spring Statement on 3 March, providing an update on economic forecasts, including growth, inflation, unemployment, government spending, and tax reve...

item.title: Rachel Reeves to Present a Steady and Calm Spring Budget After Controversial Policies
item.description: Rachel Reeves, the Chancellor of the Exchequer, is preparing to present a Spring Budget that aims to restore calm and competence following 18 months of political upheaval. After a series of controvers...

item.title: Trump Organization Announces $1bn Gold Coast Skyscraper Project Amid Conflict of Interest Concerns
item.description: The Trump Organization has announced plans to build a 335-metre skyscraper on Queensland’s Gold Coast, which would become Australia’s tallest building if completed as proposed. The project, named Trum...

item.title: BBC apologizes for airing racial slur during Bafta Film Awards; questions raised over speech edits
item.description: Labour MP Dawn Butler has requested an urgent explanation from the BBC following the broadcast of a racial slur during the Bafta Film Awards. The incident involved John Davidson, a guest with Tourette...

item.title: FBI Informant Allegedly Helped Run Dark Web Market Selling Fentanyl-Laced Drugs
item.description: The dark web market Incognito, which operated for nearly four years and sold more than $100 million worth of illegal drugs, including fentanyl-laced pills, was allegedly controlled by an FBI informant...

item.title: New Zealand Supports UK Proposal to Remove Prince Andrew from Succession Line
item.description: New Zealand has expressed its support for the possible removal of Prince Andrew from the royal line of succession, should the UK government decide to proceed. Prime Minister Christopher Luxon's spokes...

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales share St David's Day message in Welsh
item.description: On St David’s Day, the Prince and Princess of Wales, Kate and William, delivered a heartfelt message in Welsh for the first time. The video, which was recorded earlier in the week on the Windsor estat...

item.title: Menna Fitzpatrick Returns from Injury to Join Great Britain Squad for Winter Paralympics
item.description: Great Britain’s most decorated Winter Paralympian, Menna Fitzpatrick, has been selected to compete at the upcoming Winter Paralympics in Milan-Cortina, despite suffering a significant knee injury in D...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie’s Family Announces $1m Reward in Search for Missing 84-Year-Old Mother
item.description: Savannah Guthrie has announced that her family is offering a $1m reward for information leading to the return of her 84-year-old mother, Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing for 24 days. Speaking throu...
